meta.title: KYLYVNYK CLUB — trusted business connections
meta.description: A private membership club for trusted business connections, thoughtful introductions and practical exchange.

promo.label: Applications open
promo.message: The next cohort review closes soon — apply for consideration.

hero.title: Trusted connections for people building meaningful businesses.

bullets.access: A focused circle, not an open feed

trustedBy.label: Members and applicants reviewed to date

scroll.label: Scroll down to the next section

values.title: A stronger environment for business relationships.
values.lead: The club is designed for people who value context, reputation and a thoughtful introduction over cold outreach.

community.title: Curated community
community.text: Members join through a review process that protects the quality of the network.

standards.title: Clear standards
standards.text: Respect, discretion and responsible conduct shape every interaction.

reciprocity.title: Useful reciprocity
reciprocity.text: The network works when members share insight, access and support with care.

offerings.title: What the club actually provides.
offerings.lead: Not a directory, not a mailing list. A working set of formats around trust, context and useful exchange.
offerings.interactionHint: Hover to preview. Click to select.

introductions.title: Curated introductions
introductions.lead: Warm, context-rich introductions between members — never mass forwarding, never a public feed.

circles.title: Deal & partnership circles
circles.lead: Small standing groups formed around a shared theme: a market, a stage, a category of decision.

advisory.title: Applied advisory sessions
advisory.lead: Bring a real question. A hand-picked panel of members returns a decision, not a discussion.

gatherings.title: Members-only gatherings
gatherings.lead: Dinners, workshops, retreats. Invited by fit, sized for depth, hosted with care.

stewardship.title: Long-term stewardship
stewardship.lead: A named member steward keeps track of your journey — introductions, follow-through, quiet check-ins.

partners.title: Companies working alongside the club.
partners.lead: A curated group of organizations supporting members with expertise, access and practical services.
partners.note: Illustrative partner profiles for the MVP preview — verified companies and details will replace them.

advisory.name: North Harbor Advisors
advisory.description: Strategic guidance for owners navigating growth, partnerships and complex long-term decisions.

finance.name: Meridian Family Office
finance.description: Private-market perspective and considered financial support for founders and family enterprises.

legal.name: Loden Legal
legal.description: Commercial legal expertise for cross-border operations, transactions and responsible expansion.

steps.title: Five clear steps from first note to a lasting membership.
steps.lead: Fewer forms, more conversation. The same senior team is with you from application through your first year.

apply.title: Submit an application
apply.text: Tell us about your background, business context and what a useful membership would look like for you.

review.title: Complete the review
review.text: The club checks fit and may ask for additional context before making a decision.

align.title: Align on intent
align.text: A short call with a senior member to align on how the club can be genuinely useful to you.

connect.title: Enter with context
connect.text: Build your profile, meet your steward and start with thoughtful introductions.

sustain.title: Sustain the relationship
sustain.text: Ongoing stewardship, quarterly check-ins and access to circles and gatherings that fit.

topPartners.title: Companies working alongside the club.
topPartners.lead: A curated group of organizations supporting members with expertise, access and practical services.
topPartners.note: Illustrative partner profiles for the MVP preview — verified companies and details will replace them.

trustMarks.label: Trust marks
trustMarks.title: Where the club shows up.
trustMarks.lead: A rotating set of the places, press and partners that intersect with member life.
trustMarks.note: Placeholder text marks — real partner and press marks will replace them.

statsTimeline.label: Club metrics by year
statsTimeline.title: The club, in numbers.
statsTimeline.lead: Select a year to see how the community compounds: members, cities, introductions and gatherings.
statsTimeline.note: Illustrative projections for the MVP preview — figures will be replaced with verified club data.

testimonials.title: What the club experience is intended to feel like.
testimonials.lead: These statements describe the product promise; verified member stories will replace them when approved evidence is available.

one.quote: A place where an introduction arrives with enough context to make the next conversation worthwhile.
one.name: Founding member

two.quote: A network where contribution and reputation matter more than reach.
two.name: Member steward

three.quote: Every introduction I received arrived with an answer to why it was made.
three.name: Applied advisory guest

cta.title: Ready to contribute to a trusted circle?
cta.lead: Start with a short application. Membership is reviewed individually.

faq.title: What to know before applying.
faq.lead: Clear expectations help protect the quality of the community.

membership.question: Who is membership for?
membership.answer: The club is intended for founders, operators, specialists and investors who can participate responsibly and contribute useful context.

business.question: Do I need to own a business?
business.answer: No. Your professional experience and ability to contribute matter more than a specific job title or ownership status.

privacy.question: Is member information public?
privacy.answer: Member-only information is shown according to product access rules. Approved business information may appear in the public directory.

timing.question: How long does review take?
timing.answer: Review timing depends on the context supplied. We do not publish a fixed promise until operational data supports one.

contact.title: Have a question before you apply?
contact.lead: Validate your message here. Online delivery is not enabled yet, so no data is sent or stored.

response.title: A senior member reads it
response.text: Every note is triaged by a steward — not a shared inbox.

privacy.title: Discretion by default
privacy.text: Anything you write stays within the review circle and is never shared outside.

senior.title: Conflicts checked first
senior.text: We check for conflicts with existing members before responding.

form.name: Name
form.privacy: Demo form: validation happens in this browser; your message is not submitted or stored.
form.successText: Nothing was sent or stored. Contact delivery will be enabled in a separate product slice.

detail.aboutText: {name} is a verified partner of KYLYVNYK CLUB, offering exclusive benefits and expertise to club members. The partnership reflects a shared commitment to quality, trust and meaningful business relationships.
detail.memberBenefitText: As a KYLYVNYK CLUB member, you receive a {discount}% discount on services provided by {name}. This benefit is available exclusively through your club membership.
detail.howItWorksText: Contact the club to request an introduction to this partner. Your steward will provide the context needed for a productive first conversation and ensure the member benefit is applied.

meta.title: About the club
meta.description: How KYLYVNYK CLUB builds trusted business relationships through context, discretion and thoughtful stewardship.

story.title: A private circle built around the quality of each introduction, not the size of a contact list.
story.text: KYLYVNYK CLUB brings together founders, operators, specialists and investors who value useful context. The product is deliberately personal: applications are reviewed, introductions are considered and every member journey has an accountable steward.

mission.title: Make valuable business relationships easier to begin and worthy of keeping.
mission.text: We create the conditions for trust before asking people to transact. That means clear standards, careful context and follow-through after the first conversation.
mission.imageAlt: A connected city representing the club network

work.title: Formats designed for useful exchange.
work.lead: Five ways to turn shared context into focused conversations, decisions and long-term relationships.
work.ctaTitle: Bring your context into the circle.

values.title: Trust is a product decision.
values.text: Review, privacy and stewardship are not campaign language. They are the operating constraints that shape who enters, how people meet and what happens next.
values.imageAlt: Global companies connected through a trusted network

trust.title: Signals that will be verified, not invented.
trust.lead: This interactive index shows the intended recognition layer while the club prepares approved evidence.
trust.note: Placeholder press and guild marks for the MVP preview — confirmed mentions and partner evidence will replace them.
